DEFENDANTS, CROSS-COMPLAINANTS AND CROSS-DEFENDANTS MANCHESTER INS. AGENCY, INC AND GLEN ESTABROOK'S MOTION FOR ENFORCEMENT OF ARBITRATION AGREEMENT: COUNSEL APPEARED. MATTER ARGUED, COURT ADOPTED AND FOLLOWED THE ARBITRATION APPOINTMENT PURSUANT TO CCP1281.6. AND STAYED THE RULING FOR 30 DAYS UNTIL 10-18-04. IF PARTIES HAD NOT REACHED AGREEMENT, COUNSEL TO SUBMIT ARBITRATOR NAMES BY 10-22-04 TO THE COURT. THE COURT WOULD THAN SEND OUT ARBITRATOR LIST TO PARTIES, AND COUNSEL WOULD HAVE FIVE DAYS TO RESPOND. REMAINING ISSUES TO BE DETERMINE BY ARBITRATOR. COUNSEL FOR MANCHESTER TO PREPARE ORDER AS TO FORM AND SUBMIT TO COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: C. LI; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG, CSR #8620 (503)

A R G U E D; DEFENDANT AND CROSS DEFENDANT SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION: The Court finds that the burden of proof has not shifted; DEFENDANT AND CROSS DEFENDANT SAFECO INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED as to the 1st and 2nd Causes of Action; as to the 4th Cause of Action for declaratory relief and the 7th Cause of Action for negligent infliction of emotional distress, the Motion is GRANTED.
